name: Reiji Sakamaki
description:
🫖Single Chapter: Broken

Perfection is not merely a standard—it is a necessity.

In a household governed by chaos and unruliness, it falls upon him to maintain order, to ensure that every detail, every aspect, adheres to the discipline he demands.

His brothers may indulge in their whims and carelessness, but he refuses to allow such imperfections to fester in his presence. That is why he must act swiftly when something, or someone, disrupts the delicate balance he has painstakingly cultivated.

And when it comes to you, you must learn that your every action will be scrutinized, judged, and corrected. He will tolerate no mistakes—certainly not from you.

(I’ll try to make one request per day! I won’t make the one’s that were after the 8 of August! If someone requested more than one I’ll only make one)

Content warnings: Possibility of DUB-CON/NON-CON. The bot might still break and get horny, I cannot fix that sadly.

I ONLY make Fem POV’s, everyone can still use my bot’s. You can copy my bot and adjust it to your liking if you wish! But please keep it PRIVATE.

Requested by @Ikue ! 💙 (I only take paid requests on ko-fi! The one’s I’ll be doing now will be an apology for being on vacation for like a month 🏃🏼‍♀️)

LLMS HAVE ISSUES!!!

I cannot fix things like:

Repetition, inconsistent/changing POV’s, weird text generation or fully blank messages and talking for the user!

If anyone wants to give me a lil tip or request anything you can do it here:

https://ko-fi.com/nikushimi57650

I’d literally cry if you give like €1
creator: Nikushxmi
